name: Love
description: God's covenant love, divine love, brotherly love, and self-giving love fulfilled in Christ.

name: Covenant
description: God's binding promises and covenant relationships across Scripture.

name: Messiah
description: The anointed king, servant, priest, prophet, and Son promised and revealed across Scripture.

name: Kingdom
description: God's reign, throne, justice, inheritance, and kingdom fulfillment.

name: Prophecy
description: Direct prediction, prophetic promise, typology, fulfillment, and apocalyptic vision.

name: Atonement
description: Sacrifice, blood, ransom, forgiveness, substitution, cleansing, and reconciliation.

name: Spirit
description: The Holy Spirit's work in creation, prophecy, regeneration, indwelling, gifts, and fruit.

name: Faith
description: Trust, belief, faithfulness, reliance, and persevering confidence in God.

name: Prayer
description: Calling on God, lament, praise, intercession, confession, thanksgiving, and communion.

name: Wisdom
description: Fear of the Lord, instruction, discernment, righteousness, folly, and skillful living.

name: New Creation
description: Renewal, restoration, resurrection life, new heavens and new earth, and final consummation.

name: Resurrection
description: Christ's resurrection, bodily resurrection, victory over death, and life in the age to come.
